name: upsertRoadmapItem
description: Create or update a roadmap theme or milestone

kind.description: Whether the item is a theme or a milestone

title.description: Short title of the roadmap item

description.description: Detailed description of the outcome being pursued

targetDate.description: Optional target date in ISO 8601 format

itemId.description: Optional identifier when updating an existing item

name: reprioritizeRoadmap
description: Change the priority ordering of roadmap items

orderedItemIds.description: Roadmap item identifiers in the new priority order

name: publishRoadmapSnapshot
description: Publish a snapshot of the current roadmap for stakeholders
